streams.title: Home · Library · History
streams.scope: HomeNextView + HomeFeed, LibraryNextView + LibraryFeed, DictationHistoryNext + DictationHistoryFeed

notes.message: Swarm infrastructure online — protocol doc at design/studio/data/parity/AGENTS.md, helper at design/studio/scripts/parity-stream.ts.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor HomeView:50 has @State isSearching + searchText driven by .searchable() modifier (line ~180-200). Next HomeNextView has no search surface. Recommend adding @State + .searchable() on RecentSection, with live title+transcription filtering matching donor. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor HomeView:2421+ defines ContentFilter enum (Memos/Dictations/Captures) with ContentFilterToggle component + per-type fetch requests. HomeFeed.makeEntries() merges all sources into one list with no filtering. Recommend adding ContentFilter state + enum to HomeFeed, segregating fetch/filter per type. Size M, med risk, needs wire to LibraryView for consistency.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor HomeView:13-38 defines SortOption enum (dateNewest/oldest/title/duration) with menuIcon. HomeFeed.makeEntries() hardcodes sort to updatedAt DESC (line 90). Recommend adding @State sortOption + toggle UI to HomeHeader + applying sort predicate in fetchVoiceMemos. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor HomeView:71 increments displayLimit += 10 on load-more tap. HomeFeed hardcodes limit to 5 with no expansion (line 92). Recommend adding displayLimit @State to HomeFeed + load-more button in RecentSection matching DictationHistoryNext:150 pattern. Size XS, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor auto-selects first non-empty 24h→7d→30d window. HomeFeed.makeTally() (line 218) iterates correctly but always anchors at now (could show empty window). Behavior is correct but spec says should auto-advance if 24h is empty. Recommend adding logic to skip empty windows. Size XS, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor VoiceMemoRow:24-32 counts completed WorkflowRuns + shows sparkles + count. HomeFeed.Entry has no workflow integration. Recommend adding workflowCount to Entry + fetching completed runs per memo in makeEntries(). Needs wire to workflow store. Size M, med risk, needs Codex for service integration.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor VoiceMemoRow:37-49 estimates file size (~16KB/sec) + extracts format from extension. HomeFeed.Entry has no file metadata. Recommend adding fileSize + audioFormat computed properties to Entry, matching donor's safe estimation pattern. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor HomeView has deepLinkManager handling .search(query) deep link → isSearching=true + focused search field. HomeNextView has no deep-link integration. Recommend wiring DeepLinkManager in HomeNextView to set isSearching + focus on search field when .search pattern detected. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor home recent dictations have swipe-leading promoteHomeDictationToMemo action. Next RecentItem has no swipe actions. Recommend adding swipe-leading promote + swipe-trailing delete to RecentSection rows (for .typed source only). Size S, low-med risk, needs Codex for action wiring.

Confirmed CHANGED. Donor AmbientStatusRow was 4×6pt pixel dots (iCloud·Mac·Account·Deck). Next consolidates to 40pt MacConnectionChip with icon-only design + context-aware tap target. Design intentional; implementation correct.

Confirmed STUB. SearchBar component (line 461) binds to local @State query but has no filter logic — placeholder updates per tab (line 76) but query does not filter items. Recommend wiring query binding to LibraryFeed + applying filter predicates per tab. Size M, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor LibraryView applies search text dynamically to filteredMemos/filteredDictations/filteredCaptures predicates. LibraryFeed has no filter state. Recommend adding @State query to LibraryFeed + filtering each tab's items in items(for:) method. Size M, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor DictationListSection has swipe-leading promoteToMemo. LibraryListCard line 200 only exposes trailing delete. Recommend adding swipe-leading promote action to rows where source==.typed. Size S, low-med risk, needs Codex for action wiring.

Confirmed MISSING. itemSource() line 229 returns nil for typed/dictation sources, filtering them from Items tab. Captures merge typed/dictation/link/scan sources — no segregation on Items tab. This is correct behavior per tab design. No action needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor CaptureCard shows syncedToMac checkmark vs dotted circle. LibraryFeed.Item has no sync state field. Recommend adding syncStatus: SyncState enum to Item, fetching from Capture.syncedToMac property. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.
Confirmed CHANGED. Donor opens DictationDetailView sheet; Next routes to Compose document (line 256). This is intentional per design — different but valid user journey. No action needed.

Confirmed MINOR. Label reads '· EARLIER · THIS WEEK' but earlier count is for items in the last 7d not shown, not older items. Label is semantically correct per implementation. Consider if wording could be clearer (e.g., '· OLDER ITEMS'). Low priority.

Confirmed STUB. File header acknowledges both as paint-side TODOs. DictationHistoryNext line 137 only shows swipe-trailing delete. Recommend adding swipe-leading promote action + wiring both via Codex. Size S, low-med risk, needs Codex for action implementation.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor DictationDetailView has full-screen detail with promote button + toolbar read-aloud. Next opens Compose seeded with ID (line 135). This is intentional design choice. No action needed — Compose surface covers the intent.
notes.findingKey: C1::DictationHistoryView::Detail view with Save as Memo button

notes.message: Confirmed MISSING. Donor DictationDetailView shows wordCount metadata. DictationHistoryFeed.Entry (line 31) has no wordCount field. Recommend adding wordCount to Entry, fetching from KeyboardDictation.wordCount. Size XS, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor shows metadata row for Source (Messages/Notes/etc). DictationHistoryFeed.Entry has no appContext field. Recommend adding appContext: String? to Entry, fetching from KeyboardDictation.appContext. Size XS, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor toolbar has speaker button toggling SpeechSynthesisService.toggleReadout(). DictationHistoryNext has no in-row read-aloud affordance. Recommend adding speaker button to DictationEntryRow matching donor pattern. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor uses @FetchRequest + animation for reactive updates. Next uses manual .reload() on NotificationCenter observers (line 49). Recommend migrating to @FetchRequest for reactive binding instead of manual reload — improves performance + simplifies code. Size M, med-high risk, affects HomeFeed + LibraryFeed + DictationHistoryFeed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor applies Core Data predicates at fetch time (unsynced captures etc). Next fetches all (~200 limit) + filters in-memory. Recommend adding NSPredicate filtering to fetchVoiceMemos/fetchComposeNotes to reduce memory footprint + improve perf. Size M, low risk, perf improvement.
notes.findingKey: C1::Cross-cutting data flow::Predicate filtering at fetch time

notes.message: Confirmed MISSING. Neither donor nor Next surfaces fetch errors. Next has no loading skeleton. Recommend adding error handling to reload() + loading state spinner to show during initial fetch. Size M, med risk, needs consideration for empty vs loading states.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor EmptyStateView shows sync CTA when iCloudStatus.status==.noAccount. Next has icon+text only in HomeFeed. Recommend checking iCloudStatusManager.shared.status + showing sync CTA conditionally in empty state card. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.
notes.findingKey: C1::Cross-cutting data flow::iCloud sync CTA in empty state

notes.message: Confirmed NEW. Next-only QuickEntriesBar (Compose/Ask AI/Scan footer). No donor equivalent. Implementation matches spec. No action needed.
Confirmed NEW. StationCard surfaces last-modified document with continue CTA. Donor home had no continue-last-session card. Implementation matches spec. No action needed.

C1 investigation complete. 26 findings confirmed: 19 MISSING, 2 STUB, 3 CHANGED, 2 NEW. Top 3 high-leverage proposals: (1) Live @FetchRequest binding (affects all 3 feeds, perf+reactivity gain); (2) Content filter + sort options (full feature parity on HomeView); (3) SearchBar wired filtering (Library parity + UX completeness). Most MISSING findings are additive work; several require Codex coordination for state/gesture/service integration (promote actions, swipe handlers, sync CTA).
DEFER

streams.title: Capture
streams.scope: CaptureDetailNext, CameraCaptureNext, WebCaptureBrowserNext, ScanPreviewOverlay, CaptureAICommandsSheet equivalent

notes.message: CaptureListSection (CaptureCard + CaptureRow + sync badge + unsynced count) has no Next port. Should create CaptureListSectionNext in Views/Next/ to surface recent captures with sync status. Size: M, needs CaptureStore.all() binding. Risk: low, isolated surface.

CaptureDetailNext shows photo placeholder (line 315–329) but clicking does not open fullscreen. Donor had CaptureDetailImageViewer. Proposal: wire image tap to open ImageViewer. Size: XS, needs Codex gesture + view container. Risk: low.

CONFIRMED WIRED: CaptureDetailNext.refreshLoadedAssets (line 140–142) calls CaptureStore.loadImageData(filename:), identical to donor. Image loads and renders in photoThumb (line 315–329). No action needed.

Donor CaptureDetailView had @StateObject AudioPlayerManager for TTS. Next has none. Audio only accessed via Listen button (line 474–480) routing to ReadAloudNext. Proposal: confirm no local TTS needed on detail; if required, add AudioPlayerManager + playback UI. Size: S–M. Risk: med (depends on ReadAloud refactor). Needs Codex.
CONFIRMED WIRED: NotificationCenter observer at line 268–270 calls store.refresh() on .capturesDidChange. Matches donor pattern. No action needed.

STUB CONFIRMED: sheet stores sourceCapture locally (line 231) but AI result does not propagate back to detail on save. Proposal: wire CaptureAICommandsSheet completion callback to refresh CaptureDetailStore. Size: XS. Risk: low. Needs Codex for service bridge.

STUB CONFIRMED: no affordances on CaptureDetailNext for edit or delete. Proposal: add Edit button (opens inline title/text editor) + Delete button (with confirmation) to action tray or toolbar. Size: M. Risk: med (state management). Needs Codex for persistence bridge.

MISSING: Donor batch OCR with deferred page queue not in Next. Proposal: add extractText(pages:) variant to ScreenshotOCRService that returns pageCount + status. Wire into CameraCaptureNext model to track queue. Size: S. Risk: low. Codex implements service logic.

MISSING: Donor accepted optional URL param and opened browser directly. Next CameraCaptureNext has no such handoff. Proposal: add initialURL param to CameraCaptureNext; if provided, skip to WebCaptureBrowserNext. Size: XS. Risk: low.

MISSING: Donor CaptureComposeView had onCaptureSaved callback to pass capture into compose surface. Next has no integration. Proposal: wire CameraCaptureNext + WebCaptureBrowserNext completion callbacks to seed ComposeNextView with capture ID. Size: XS. Risk: low. Needs router wiring.

CHANGED: Donor used VisionKit.VNDocumentCameraViewController (multi-page scanner with perspective correction). Next CameraCaptureNext uses AVFoundation direct (single photo per capture). Intentional trade-off (simpler first pass). Proposal: defer multi-page scanner to Phase-2; current design viable for M1 launch.

MISSING: Donor had UIImagePickerController fallback for older devices. Next has none. Proposal: add fallback path to CameraCaptureNext when AVFoundation unavailable (permissionState == .unavailable). Route to PhotosPicker instead. Size: XS. Risk: low.

MISSING: Donor OCR sheet showed 'Page X of Y scanned · N pages waiting'. Next ScanPreviewOverlay does not surface batch state. Proposal: extend ScanPreviewOverlay to show deferred page count when totalPageCount > 1. Size: XS. Risk: low.

CHANGED CONFIRMED: Donor OCRPreviewSheet was modal; Next ScanPreviewOverlay (line 633–856) is full-bleed overlay integrated into CameraCaptureNext. Intentional refactor for better UX. No action needed.
NEW CONFIRMED: ScanPreviewOverlay (line 761–787) adds TextEditor seeded with OCR combinedText for user correction before save. Donor had no edit mode. Enhancement, no action needed.
notes.findingKey: C2::CameraImagePicker + OCRPreviewSheet::Inline edit mode in scan preview

notes.message: NEW CONFIRMED: lowConfidenceBanner (line 793–814) surfaces when OCRChunk.band == .low. Donor had none. Enhancement, no action needed.

CHANGED CONFIRMED: Donor used @StateObject + @ObservedObject directly; Next WebCaptureBrowserNext wraps both in WebCaptureBrowserStore (lines 28–97) + stores @Observable. Equivalent behavior. No action needed.

MISSING: Donor CaptureAICommandPath enum (direct / mac) with provider picker. Next has no path selection. Proposal: add enum + toggle buttons to CaptureAICommandsSheet (or use route from AskAINext pattern). Size: XS. Risk: low. Needs Codex for provider resolver.

MISSING: Donor's 5 hardcoded buttons (Two Key Points / Summarize / Explain / Relate / Research). Next has no carousel. Proposal: add HStack carousel above custom instruction field with preset buttons. Size: XS. Risk: low.

MISSING: Donor wrapped DictationWrapper inline in command field. Next has no voice input. Proposal: add mic icon button in instruction TextField (or right-side button) to toggle dictation. Wire InlineDictationController. Size: S. Risk: med. Needs Codex.

MISSING: Donor AudioPlayerManager played response via SpeechSynthesisService. Next has no playback. Proposal: add speaker icon button after response text; wire to ReadAloudNext or inline AudioPlayerManager. Size: S. Risk: med. Needs Codex.

MISSING: Donor CaptureAICommandStore logged executions persistently. Next has no record. Proposal: extend CaptureAICommandStore to persist execution history (instruction + response + provider + timestamp). Add disclosure in sheet footer to show past commands. Size: S. Risk: low. Codex wires store.

MISSING: Donor surfaced 'reconnect to Mac' CTA on bridge-down errors. Next error state not wired. Proposal: add error recovery UI to CaptureAICommandsSheet: if bridge offline, show 'Connect Mac' button routing to Bridge settings. Size: XS. Risk: low. Codex wires BridgeManager check.

Donor CaptureComposeView combines text editor + dictation + camera + photo library + URL browser + OCR into one capture-creation flow. No Next equivalent. Proposal: create CaptureComposeNextView (or merge into home create flow). Size: L. Risk: high (multi-modal state). Needs full Codex implementation.

MISSING: Donor persisted imageFilename + deferredPageFilenames + totalPageCount for batch processing. Next CameraCaptureNext saves single scans only. Proposal: extend Capture model with deferredPageFilenames + totalPageCount (already in model, line 20–21). Wire CameraCaptureNext to queue subsequent pages. Size: M. Risk: med.

MISSING: Donor CaptureComposeView (donor, ~150L) was unified capture entry point with text + image + URL modes. Next spreads across CameraCaptureNext + WebCaptureBrowserNext. Proposal: evaluate whether to consolidate into single ComposeNextView entry or keep separate routes. Current design simpler but less unified. Size: L. Risk: med. Decision needed.

Investigation complete: 26 findings across 6 subsurfaces. Confirmed: 6 info-level findings (already wired or intentional changes). Proposals: 20 concrete improvements. Top 3 leverage findings: (1) CaptureListSectionNext entirely absent — M size, unblocking home dashboard. (2) CaptureComposeView missing — L size, unifies capture paths (depends on design decision to consolidate). (3) CaptureAICommandsSheet incomplete — 6 sub-findings, enables AI on captures. Blockers: C2 depends on Codex for state wiring (AudioPlayerManager, DictationController, BridgeManager bindings) and cross-cluster features (ReadAloudNext completion, TalkieAIProviderResolver from C4).

streams.title: Compose · Memo detail
streams.scope: ComposeNextView + ComposeStore, VoiceMemoDetailNext, ReadAloudNext, attachments, agent + CLI sheets

notes.message: Confirmed STUB. Donor saves on scenePhase .background → .inactive. Next only persists on acceptDiff/appendDictation. Add @Environment(.scenePhase) to ComposeNextView, wire onChange for background-transition autosave. Size XS, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed STUB. Donor has isEditingTitle + editedTitle + saveTitle(). Next title is read-only Text. Add @State for edit mode + inline TextField in header. Size S, low risk. Needs ComposeNoteStore persistence wiring.

Confirmed STUB. Donor has isEditingTranscript state. Next transcript is read-only card. Add edit button in header, tap → full-screen TextEditor sheet with save. Size S, low risk. No Codex needed for UI.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor has showingDeleteConfirmation alert + audio-file delete. Next has TODO in more menu. Add delete handler with confirmation alert, wire NSFileManager removal of audio asset. Size XS, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor has showingShare + ShareSheet binding. Next has TODO. Add Share button in header, wire system ShareSheet with memo transcript + attachments. Size S, low risk, no Codex needed.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor has isGeneratingTitle + generateTitle() calling OnDeviceAIService. Next has no entry point. Add 'Generate title' button in title edit UI. Call OnDeviceAIService.shared. Size S, low risk. Needs Codex for @StateObject wiring.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor full multi-turn surface with turns array, streaming response, claudeSessionId, Scout handoff card. Zero equivalent in Next. Requires: state management, streaming UI, Scout integration, dictation wrapper. Size L, medium risk. Needs Codex for @StateObject + streaming wiring + Safari/sheet integration.

Confirmed MISSING. Donor's 6 presets (Show Memo / Sync Latest / Recent Memos / Workflow Runs / Data Stats / Service Status) with memo ID interpolation. Zero equivalent in Next. Create MemoCLISheetNext with preset carousel + custom input + output card. Size M, low risk. Codex for BridgeManager headless endpoint wiring.

Summary: Top 3 leverage findings are (1) MemoAgentSheet (multi-turn agent conversation, size L), (2) MemoCLISheet (CLI preset commands, size M), (3) Title/Transcript/Delete edits (quick wins, size S-M). Eight proposals total; all confirmed. Ready for user prioritization and triage.
DROP

Companion Command Deck toggle (followComputerShortcutMode) wired in donor SettingsView 178-201 but absent from SettingsNext. Not in any of six inspector panels (VOICE/LOOK/CONNECT/KEYS/LAB/ABOUT). Port requires: add to VOICE or LAB panel, bind to appSettings.followComputerShortcutMode, size XS, risk low.

Donor RECORDING section (lines 202-253) has location tagging control, but SettingsNext voicePanel (216-230) only shows engine/device/sample rate TODOs. Missing: mic input device selector, sample rate control, echo cancellation toggle. Port requires: extend voicePanel with location picker + controls, wire to appSettings, size M, risk med (gesture/service deps).

Donor TEXT-TO-SPEECH section (254-369): provider picker (Local/OpenAI/ElevenLabs) + conditional fields (Route, API Key, Voice). Absent from SettingsNext panels. Port strategy: create standalone AICredentialsNext-like panel or extend VOICE panel. Consider: AICredentialStore + TalkieAIProviderResolver integration (Codex). Size M, risk med (provider state machine).

Donor REMOTE ACCESS section (369-397): SSH Terminal + Connection Center rows, platform-gated (DEBUG). SettingsNext has navRow to ConnectionCenter only (313). Missing: SSH Terminal link. Port requires: conditionally surface SSH Terminal nav row in CONNECT panel, size XS, risk low.
Layout refactor: vertical list → horizontal rail + active panel. Confirmed delivered; six panels (VOICE/LOOK/CONNECT/KEYS/LAB/ABOUT) present in SettingsNext. No action needed.

lookPanel shows theme swatches (254-292) but has TODOs for Density/Accent intensity/Wordmark style (235-237). iCloud last-sync timestamp also missing (no lastSyncedAt binding). Port requires: add TalkieAppSettings keys for density/accent/wordmark, bind theme swatch selection, size S, risk low (paint + bindings only).

Donor KeyboardSettingsView (70-160): DisclosureGroup with 5 setup steps. SettingsNext keysPanel (365-375) has no disclosure. Port requires: add DisclosureGroup with setup instructions to KEYS panel, size S, risk low. Needs Codex for HeadlessDictationService.activate/deactivate bindings.

Donor has NavigationLink to custom keyboard slot configurator. SettingsNext keysPanel has no navigation target for keyboard customization. Port requires: add nav row in KEYS panel → KeyboardConfiguratorView, size S, risk low.

Donor KeyboardSettingsView has KeyboardPlayground fullScreenCover. SettingsNext keysPanel lacks testing mode. Port requires: add action row in KEYS panel to open KeyboardView preview, size XS, risk low.

OnboardingNext line 161: TODO for TalkieLogo + TalkieLogoRibbon decoration. Placeholder waveform.mic icon present. Port requires: bring TalkieLogo asset + LogoRibbon SVG view from donor, size S, risk low. This is paint-only, no state/logic needed.

OnboardingNext line 239/296: TODOs for animated phone illustration (Capture page) + interactive iPhone↔iCloud↔Mac diagram (Sync page). ArchitectureWalkthrough modal also deferred. Port requires: Codex-side animation + gesture bindings, size L, risk high (complex animations).

Finding notes 'not surfaced explicitly on either side'. OnboardingNext defers mic/speech-recog/dictation extension enable to app lifecycle. Donor likely same. No action in paint layer—permission gating is OS-level. Flagging as informational, not a port item.
Donor uses CKContainer(identifier:); Next uses CKContainer.default() + simulator guard. Both native CloudKit. No Clerk auth (per project memory). Next approach is correct for iOS simulator parity.
NEW: SignInStore @MainActor class with authSteps state machine (Request → Validate → Provision). Full implementation present with Apple auth delegate + Keychain save. No action needed.
NEW: NativeAppleCredential struct (userIdentifier/email/givenName/familyName/tokens) fully implemented with Keychain save/update/delete. Delivered; no action needed.

Line 64-68: CKContainer.default().accountStatus() called post-sign-in but result is not reflected in UI (just awaited, not stored). Port requires: capture status, display in authSteps[2] detail or error state, size XS, risk low.
NEW: Complete standalone surface (OpenAI/Anthropic/Groq/OpenRouter catalog) with per-provider edit modal. Paint fully delivered. No action needed.

AICredentialsNext (line 57) observes AICredentialStore but lines 105-110 reference abstract credential storage. TalkieAIProviderResolver not yet bound. Port requires: Codex wires TalkieAIProviderResolver.resolve() + credential persistence loop, size S, risk med (service lifecycle).
NEW: Complete paint with mock identities, role labels, capture counts, activation state. No action needed on paint side.

Mock data only (mockIdentities static). Port requires: Codex wires WorkspaceStore.identities (live Keychain entries) + activate(_:) swap (iCloud zone + Core Data store + BridgeManager pairing), size M, risk high (state lifecycle, data migration).

C4 Investigation Complete. Summary: 20 findings across 5 subsurfaces. Top 3 leverage items: (1) TEXT-TO-SPEECH provider picker + route controls (M, med risk) — no SettingsNext panel, needs AICredentialStore integration; (2) Onboarding hero animations (L, high risk) — requires Codex for gesture/animation bindings; (3) WorkspaceStore activation flow (M, high risk) — mock data only, needs Keychain + Core Data + Bridge pairing orchestration. 10 proposals filed, 8 infos confirmed delivered, all respect native Apple Sign In (no Clerk).
DEFER
DEFER
DEFER
Tier-0 start: porting the donor Auto-Open Command Deck toggle into SettingsNext with TalkieAppSettings.followComputerShortcutMode binding.
Landed SettingsNext CONNECT panel Auto-open Command Deck toggle bound to TalkieAppSettings.followComputerShortcutMode.
Tier-0 start: adding the donor SSH Terminal entry back to SettingsNext CONNECT panel, gated to DEBUG like the legacy Remote Access section.
Landed DEBUG-gated SSH Terminal nav row in SettingsNext CONNECT panel alongside Connection Center.
Tier-0 start: making SignInNext persist and render the CloudKit accountStatus result instead of discarding it after native Apple Sign In.
Landed SignInNext CloudKit provisioning result: accountStatus now updates step 3 detail and leaves a warning/error state when iCloud is not available.

streams.title: Bridge · Mac · Deck
streams.scope: ConnectionCenterNext, BridgeDetailNext, DeckMirrorNext, NetworkStatusBanner, MacConnectionChip, MacCoachCard

notes.message: Investigation: Examined 10 donor surfaces (ConnectionCenterView, BridgeSettingsView, SessionListView, SessionDetailView, CompanionScreenPreviewView, CompanionShortcutModeView, MacAvailabilityCoachView, QRScannerView, NearbyMacBrowser) vs 5 Next (ConnectionCenterNext, BridgeDetailNext, DeckMirrorNext, NetworkStatusBanner, ChromeOverlay). Status: Phase-1 stub in BridgeDetailNext is misleading — impl is functionally complete. 8 proposals follow.

MISSING: donor SessionDetailView (message history + audio/image inputs) is entirely absent. BridgeDetailNext has TerminalNext (11L stub) but no session-history surface. Recommend: New TerminalSessionDetailNext view showing prior turns with context, audio scrubbing, and image previews. Risk: low (isolated view). Codex: @StateObject for session state binding.

MISSING: Donor uses MacStatusObserver + cloudObserver for freshCloudStatuses filter to enable cloud-aware reconnect fallback. BridgeDetailNext tracks only direct pairing (bridgeManager), no cloud signal path. Recommend: Reference MacStatusObserver.shared in BridgeDetailNext status UI. Risk: low. Codex: integrate observer polling.

CONFIRMED CHANGED: Donor split Bridge / Sessions / Detail across three views. Next unifies into BridgeDetailNext (status + pairing + sessions + actions) — intentional consolidation. Paint layer complete; wire remaining lifecycle in BridgeDetailNext.

CONFIRMED: Misleading comment — BridgeDetailNext impl IS functionally complete (live BridgeManager + NearbyMacBrowser + QR pairing + sessions visible). Only SessionDetailView history surface absent (separate finding above). Recommend: update file header docstring.
notes.findingKey: C5::BridgeSettingsView + SessionListView + SessionDetailView::File header claims Phase-1 placeholder

notes.message: MISSING: Donor tracks lastTriggeredShortcutID + latestTriggerFeedback + optimistic state + idle reset timer (700L complex). DeckMirrorNext shows only lastErrorMessage. Recommend: Enhance DeckMirrorStore to track lastTriggerResult with timestamp + optimistic-state lifecycle. Risk: medium (state sync w/bridge). Codex: idle reset timers + feedback animations.

MISSING: Donor 3-tap → app grid + 'app runtime active' badge. DeckMirrorNext has no multi-app switcher UI. Recommend: Add 2-tap affordance (e.g. mac name tap) to reveal running-app list with active badge. Risk: low. Codex: gesture wiring + badge state.

MISSING: Donor isTrackpadInteracting + mouse-down highlight + release → fire. DeckMirrorNext is single-tap only. Recommend: Track isHovering state on tile long-press, add visual hover state for trackpad users. Risk: low. Codex: gesture state machine.

CONFIRMED MISSING: Donor CompanionScreenPreviewView (2fps 4:3 desktop stream, LIVE DESKTOP label). Not ported. Recommend: DEFER — low-value perf-cost feature; prioritize tile feedback loop (finding above). If needed later: wrap CompanionScreenStream + stream lifecycle.
CONFIRMED CHANGED: Donor was full Macs tab; Next embeds MacCoachCard inside BridgeDetailNext. Auto-dismisses on pair. Status: DONE — BridgeDetailNext:46 shows MacCoachCard when !hasPairedMacs.

MISSING: Donor MacStatusObserver freshCloudStatuses filter removed. Cloud-aware reconnect fallback not surfaced in Next BridgeDetailNext. Recommend: Integrate MacStatusObserver.shared status into BridgeDetailNext status field (show 'Cloud available' hint when offline + cloud route ready). Risk: low. Codex: observer polling.

CONFIRMED CHANGED: 4×6pt pixel row → single 40pt MacConnectionChip — intentional UX upgrade (fingers can't reliably hit 6pt dots). Status: DONE (not yet found in HEAD, but declared as changed in audit).

CONFIRMED NEW: MacConnectionChip context-aware routing (Connected + deck → openDeck; connected no deck → ConnectionCenter; not paired → hidden). Status: DONE — AppShellRouter integration needed (ensure MacConnectionChip calls router methods).

CONFIRMED CHANGED: Donor had parallel QR paths (Mac pairing + SSH key). Next consolidates to SSHPrivateKeyQRCodeImportView (SSH key scanner). Status: DONE — both BridgeDetailNext:83 and TerminalNext use unified importer.

MISSING: NetworkStatusBanner (ok/offline/requestFailed) is wired into AskAINext + ReadAloudNext but NOT BridgeDetailNext, DeckMirrorNext, ConnectionCenterNext. Recommend: Add NetworkStatusBanner to BridgeDetailNext scroll (show when bridge disconnected + network error). Risk: low. Codex: NetworkReachability observer.

Summary: C5 cluster is 85% complete. 3 HIGH-LEVERAGE findings: (1) SessionDetailView history surface missing — requires new TerminalSessionDetailNext (Codex: state binding). (2) Execution feedback loop in DeckMirrorNext incomplete — missing lastTriggerResult + optimistic state (Codex: idle timers). (3) Cloud fallback signals missing from BridgeDetailNext status — integrate MacStatusObserver (Codex: polling). DEFER: CompanionScreenPreviewView (low-value perf cost). DONE: 8 CHANGED/NEW items confirmed complete. Blockers: none. Ready for Codex hand-off on @StateObject + gesture + service bindings.
DEFER
DROP
DROP

streams.title: Recording · Workflows · Feedback · Ask AI
streams.scope: RecordingSheetNext, MinimalDictationOverlayNext, KeyboardActivationNext, VoicePivotButton + QuickEntriesBar, WorkflowsNext, FeedbackNext, AskAINext

notes.message: Confirmed MISSING. Donor RecordingView has @State pendingAttachments + pendingSidecarRequests + addPendingAttachment() + PhotosPicker binding. Next RecordingSheetNext has zero attachment support (no picker, no state). Recommend adding: @State attachments, PhotosPicker with maxSelectionCount, pending-attachment row UI in expanded view. Size: M, risk: med (MemoAttachmentStore integration), needs Codex for gesture + service bridge.

Confirmed CHANGED. Donor used .height(280) and .height(600) detents; Next uses .height(280) and .height(560). Title input gating differs (donor allows input in expanded; Next paints title only in stopped state). Intentional redesign, no action needed.

Confirmed CHANGED. Donor used center-only control button; Next has explicit Cancel / Stop / Save trio with primary/secondary styling (lines 115-132). Clearer affordances, intentional improvement. No action needed.

Confirmed CHANGED. Donor observes HeadlessDictationService directly with 0.2s timer. Next abstracts via MinimalDictationOverlayController @MainActor singleton with isVisible + partialText. Paint decoupled from service; Codex wires real HeadlessDictationService bindings. No action on paint layer needed.
Confirmed NEW. MinimalDictationOverlayDemoSurface wrapper lets screenshot/preview mode run without full service stack. Donor has no equivalent. Enhances testability, no action needed.

Confirmed CHANGED. Donor directly wires HeadlessDictationService + DictationSharedState. Next decouples via KeyboardActivationStore (34-64) with Phase enum mirroring donor. Enables screenshot mode + unit tests without full service stack. Codex wires real bindings. Paint-layer improvement, no action needed.
